ocean._comment: S62 underwater geology. Feature-flagged; disable by setting enabled=false. Only modifies pixels where biome is _OCEAN/_DEFAULT AND surface_y < 63. Land untouched.

palette._comment: S65: soil-compatible blocks (sand/gravel/clay/dirt) dominate at every depth so seagrass/kelp can actually grow. Hard stones (stone/tuff/deepslate) kept minimal as accents only.

floor_noise._comment: Subtle ±Y relief on the ocean floor. amplitude_y=0 disables.

coastline_shape._comment: Per-pixel depth gamma reshape. gamma=1.0 = identity (no change). gamma>1 = gradual coast (long shallow shelf). gamma<1 = sharp coast (deep water close to shore). max_depth_for_reshape = reference depth used as gamma normalization anchor. S62: gamma 1.3 for gentle tidal-shelf coastlines.

biome_variants._comment: S65: per-adjacent-land-biome palette overrides for underwater pixels. Only the listed biomes get variants. Others fall through to the default ocean palette.

features._comment: S65: sparse visual accents. Boulders (rocky blobs) in shallow+mid. Coral clusters (tropical-adjacent only) in shallow. Clay lenses (mid tier) as sediment pockets.

vegetation._comment: S63+S65: underwater vegetation. S65 bumped kelp density ~4x in deep/mid. Only placed on soft substrates (sand/gravel/dirt/clay/coarse_dirt/rooted_dirt). Sum within a tier is the total 'any vegetation' probability.

snow_carpet._comment: S65: drop BOREAL_ALPINE + BOREAL_TAIGA — only truly-snowy biomes get the carpet. Outward ramp bleed retained (hard boundary line would look worse per user).

sand_dune_smoothing._comment: S69: Reverted to S67 intensity â€” the S68 crank (sigma=16 passes=6 buffer=36) was needed only to hide sharp Gaea dune geometry, which the new dune_flatten pass now handles at the source. Mountain interiors adjacent to biome boundaries no longer get smeared 36 blocks deep.

dune_flatten._comment: S69: Root-cause fix for sand-dune boundary seams. Pulls gap_mask==8 pixels toward a wide-sigma neighbourhood baseline (70% baseline / 30% original), then locally smooths the dune mask + 4-block dilation. Runs BEFORE sand_dune_smoothing in decorate_surface. Disable if duneless worlds are ever wanted.

sbt_mountaincap._comment: S68: unified SBT dither â€” one decision drives both snow carpet AND biome tag. Pixels below min_y OR with noise<threshold in [min_y,max_y] get remapped to BOREAL_ALPINE (no snow, plains tag). Above max_y always SBT (snow, snowy_taiga tag).

sand_dunes._comment: S63: enabled=false — dune Y-lift was causing biome-edge seams at tiles (84,84) and (30,88). Sand blocks still apply via gap==8 in surface_decorator; only the raised peaks are disabled.

eco_ground_cover._comment_s85: S85: width 40 -> 100 + swap_cap 0.75 -> 0.85. User wants 'incredibly wide transitional biomes where biomes almost become each other'. Net effect: 100-block fade each side of every biome boundary = 200-block transitional zone with up to 85% block-mix.

species_habitats._doc: Per-species habitat curves. Each gradient: [center, width] for sigmoid. cliff_deg_max: hard slope cutoff.

lithology._comment: Phase 0.5 (S44) — see PHYSICAL_REALISM_REFACTOR.md §6 Pass 0. Feature-flagged off by default.

granitic.description: Intrusive igneous basement — default temperate highland. S60 palette. S85: weighted distribution (~23% each granite/dripstone/packed_mud/rooted_dirt + ~8% raw_iron_block as rare accent).

arid_basaltic.description: Arid/semi-arid mafic — dune + steppe + karst margins. S60 renamed from sedimentary.

temperate_basaltic.description: S84: dark metamorphic mix — deepslate-heavy (~36%) + cobbled_deepslate (~27%) + basalt (~27%) + rare deepslate_coal_ore (~9%). Coastal headland / temperate peak feel.

limestone.description: S85: full repaint — calcite (~45%) dominant + diorite (~36%) slightly less, dead_horn_coral_block (~9%) + light_gray_concrete_powder (~9%) as rare accents. Karst barrens + cave-prone carbonate.

deepslate_metamorphic.description: High-alpine / arctic basement. S60 palette. S85: removed tuff per user (was 16.7%, now redistributed to remaining 5 blocks at 20% each).

mossy_temperate.description: Wet temperate rainforest regolith. S60 palette.

elevation_overrides._comment: Rules evaluated in order; first match wins. mc_y thresholds are post-spline.

basement._comment: Deep basement below shallow_depth_blocks — set shallow_group_from_surface=True to keep shallow horizon tied to surface group.

surface_pipeline._comment: Phase 0.75 shadow_mode: smoke test (output discarded). Phase 2.0 feature_flag_enabled: when true, runs temperate cliff/talus/fluting layers and merges into surface_blocks. Legacy path preserved as fallback for unclaimed pixels.

treelines._comment_s85: S85: full rescale for 768-height world. Old 380 was tuned for 448-height. Proportional bump preserves S58 ecological ordering (BT/SBT highest mountain forest, BA krummholz/treeline, ARC_TUN scrub, FROZEN_FLATS sparsest).

gaea_gaps._comment: S60 query-time path. When use_query_time=true, rock_gap + snow_gap are sampled live from the 8k Gaea sources via Catmull-Rom at tile time instead of read from the 50k rock_gap.tif / snow_gap.tif. Drops ~4.6 GB of baked masks; threshold + dither become runtime knobs. See core/gaea_gap_sampler.py.
